name: outfit-seamly-plan
description: Outfit select or create brief + Seamly2D project plan (download seamly.io)

steps.text: Seamly download: https://seamly.io/download/ — skill outfit-selector-create. FOSS apparel CAD. Then optional instagram-selfie-selector for photos.

steps.prompt: Using skill outfit-selector-create and knowledge/fashion/ (seamly-outfit-workflow.md, outfit-selector-create.md): (1) if user listed wardrobe options run select-outfit (2) else create-outfit-brief for their occasion/vibe (3) if sewing/pattern intent: measure-sheet placeholders + seamly-project-plan (4) seamly-download-guide pointing to https://seamly.io/download/ (form → email link; user CLICK) (5) materials-list high-level (6) optional hand-off-slay to Instagram skill. No body shame. No commercial pattern piracy. Not medical advice.
